ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
ayat.english: When Earth is shaken with her (final) earthquake
And Earth yieldeth up her burdens,
And man saith: What aileth her?
That day she will relate her chronicles,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
ayat.english: That day mankind will issue forth in scattered groups to be shown their deeds.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayat.english: And whoso doeth good an atom's weight will see it then,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayat.english: And whoso doeth ill an atom's weight will see it then.
